title: High Court (disambiguation)
content:
'''High Court''' can refer to:

*'''[[High Court (Kegan)|High Court]]''', a judiciary body on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]]
*'''[[Lannik High Court]]'''
*A name for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]/[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Court of Justice]]

{{Disambig}}
